You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You read the potion recipe:
Rincewind's potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, apple, peach, spider egg.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Stir the liquid using a borpulus.
3. Add the apple into your cauldron.
4. Wave a ice wand on your cauldron.
5. Put the spider egg into your cauldron.
6. Put the peach into your cauldron.

You drop the ice wand on the floor.

> go to pantryhouse-pantry
The pantry is empty. There is a passage to a kitchen here.
> take peach
You take the peach. In your inventory you have a peach.
> go to kitchen
You are in a kitchen now. There are a ice wand, a borpulus, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a liquid. The ice wand is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
> go to conservatory
You are in a conservatory now. There are a prickly pear and a planting table. The prickly pear is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
> go to hallway
You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a bedroom, a magic workshop, a reading room and a broom closet here.
> go to reading room
You are in a reading room now. There are a couch, a chair, a shelf, a side table and a table. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
> go to garden
You are in a garden now. There are a nightshade, a garden bench, a lily of the valley and a bucket of water. The nightshade is on the floor. The lily of the valley is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
> go to storage room
You are in a storage room now. There are a plinkle crystal, a plunkle crystal, a ladle, a crate, a plonkle crystal, a spoon and a whisk. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. The whisk is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
> go to cellar
You are in a cellar now. There are a green beetle, a spiderweb, a bucket of ectoplasm, a red beetle, a spider egg and a spider. The green beetle is on the floor. The spiderweb is on the floor. The bucket of ectoplasm is on the floor. The red beetle is on the floor. The spider egg is on the floor. The spider is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
> take spider egg
You take the spider egg. In your inventory you have a peach and a spider egg.
> go to hallway
You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a bedroom, a magic workshop, a reading room and a broom closet here.
> go to magic workshop
You are in a magic workshop now. There are a workbench, a orrery, a fire wand, a fairy wand and a zulpowand. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
> go to kitchen
You are in a kitchen now. There are a ice wand, a borpulus, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a liquid. The ice wand is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The cupboard is closed. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put spider egg in cauldron
The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done

The cupboard is closed. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The ice wand is on the floor. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put spider egg in cauldron
The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.
I don't know what you mean.

The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.
I don't know what you mean.
> go to kitchen
You are in a kitchen now. There are a borpulus, a liquid, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a ice wand. The borpulus is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. You are in a kitchen now. There are a borpulus, a liquid, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a ice wand. The borpulus is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. The cupboard is closed. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The ice wand is on the floor. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put spider egg in cauldron
The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.

The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.
I don't know what you mean.

Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put spider egg in cauldron
The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.

The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.
I don't know what you mean.
> go to kitchen
You are in a kitchen now. There are a borpulus, a liquid, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a ice wand. The borpulus is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. You are in a kitchen now. There are a borpulus, a liquid, a cupboard, a cauldron, a counter, a plate and a ice wand. The borpulus is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. The cupboard is closed. The cauldron is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The ice wand is on the floor. There are passages to a conservatory and a pantry here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put spider egg in cauldron
The spider egg is now in the cauldron.
The spider egg absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a snap.
> put peach in cauldron
The peach is now in the cauldron.
The peach absorbs into the liquid in the cauldron with a crackle.
The liquid in the cauldron starts to glow.
You have successfully brewed Rincewind's potion.
> done
You have achieved your goal. Congratulations!
Thank you for playing.
